metadata.name: Content Moderation Workflow
metadata.description: Automated content generation with human approval for compliance
metadata.author: Kaizen Team

inputs.name: Content Request
inputs.default: Write a product description for our new AI-powered analytics platform

outputs.name: Audit Trail
outputs.description: Complete audit trail of generation and approval

documentation.overview: This multi-agent workflow generates content and requires human approval before publishing. The CodeGenerationAgent creates the content, then HumanApprovalAgent requests human review before releasing it. Perfect for regulated industries, brand-sensitive content, and compliance-critical publishing workflows.
use_cases: Marketing content approval for brand compliance
Financial report generation with regulatory review
Legal document drafting with attorney approval
Medical content creation with clinical review
prerequisites: OpenAI API key configured as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
Approval callback configured (CLI, web form, or webhook)

example_inputs.content_request: Write a product description for our new AI-powered analytics platform

example_outputs.approved_content: Transform your data into actionable insights with our AI-powered analytics platform. Advanced machine learning algorithms automatically detect patterns, predict trends, and recommend data-driven decisions—all in real-time.
